skip_reason: Bookmarklet is meant to run on an individual Instagram post page. Instagram media URLs require an authenticated session to load reliably, and the embedded preview image will 404 without authentication.
notes: Passive - V9 modal (id: __igSaveImgModal) titled 'Instagram Save Image'. Constructs the media URL from window.location.href (appending 'media/?size=l'), shows a modal with the image embedded (right-click to save) and Export buttons to open in new tab or copy URL.
